images.depicts: wooden bed frame with rumpled cream linens
large plain white egg in a straw nest
close-up of a bent arm/elbow with clenched fist
baby elephant close-up, trunk curled, walking
toy elf figure in knitted green hat and outfit
vintage red-and-gold toy train engine, smoke
close-up hand reaching for a small glowing seed/object
hen perched on top of a shaggy terrier's head
images.issue: the lyric line this should illustrate is explicitly 'On the cat?! Ten hens on the cat!' - no cat appears in this image, a dog is shown instead

images.depicts: cluster of hens perched on a rustic wooden pen railing
hens amid flying feathers on a wooden bed
hens covering a shirtless photorealistic human man, eyes closed
images.issue: photorealistic human breaks from the peg-doll cast style used elsewhere in the curriculum (e.g. on-celebrate.png, sam-pot.png in Week 11)

images.depicts: photorealistic human man lunging to catch scattering hens, feathers flying
images.issue: same photorealistic-human style break as hens-on-man.png

images.depicts: egg-shaped potato wearing round glasses, nested among hens
row of ~7 hens with a glowing letter E in the background
images.issue: only about 7 hens are clearly visible, not a literal 10 (minor)

images.depicts: line of hens walking, close focus on the front two

line_map.line: E-e-egg! E-e-hen! Ten hens and an egg!
Ten hens! Ten hens! Where are the ten hens?
On the bed! On the bed! Ten hens on the bed!
In the pen! In the pen! Ten hens in the pen!
On the man! On the man! Ten hens on the man!
line_map.note: content matches but uses a photorealistic human, style break - see wrong_art

line_map.line: Get the hens! Get the hens!
On the cat?! (on the CAT?!) Ten hens on the cat!
The egg is big… The egg is a… (POTATO!)

generate.line: On the cat?! (on the CAT?!) Ten hens on the cat!
generate.mj_prompt: dark forest editorial photography, a fluffy brown hen perched calmly on top of a wide-eyed striped tabby cat's head, cat looking alarmed and annoyed, muted green background, cinematic Montessori dark-trap aesthetic, matches the visual style of hens-in-pen.png

wrong_art.issue: filename and image content show a hen on a DOG's head, but the lyric it must illustrate is explicitly 'On the cat?! (on the CAT?!) Ten hens on the cat!' - no dog appears anywhere in this song's lyrics, and no cat appears in this image
wrong_art.fix: regenerate as hen-on-cat.png (see generate list); hen-on-dog.png should not be used for this song

wrong_art.issue: these use a photorealistic human adult rather than the peg-doll cast style established elsewhere in the curriculum - visual style break, lower priority than the hen-on-dog mismatch
wrong_art.fix: OPTIONAL - if strict cast consistency is required, regenerate with a peg-doll 'farmer' character; otherwise acceptable-hold since content itself matches the lyric
wrong_art.mj_prompt: dark forest editorial photography, wooden peg-doll farmer character (Sam/Segina cast style) with hens perched on head and shoulders / running from chasing hens, feathers flying, muted green background, cinematic Montessori dark-trap aesthetic
